backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user authentication, role-based access control (SuperAdmin, Admin with granular permissions), and admin user management with profile storage and permission checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two YouTube embedding features: fixing video display from pasted links and configuring autoplay with error handling for embed restrictions.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend pages and components, including routing, layout, navigation, and content sections like HomePage with YouTube hymn player, management pages, and public-facing pages.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Barobo National High School website React application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component configuring TanStack Router with all page routes, QueryClient setup, and route definitions for public pages, admin pages, and category-prefixed aliases.
frontend/src/components/Banner.tsx: Banner component displaying current banner image from backend or default, supporting both file uploads and external URLs with animated GIF detection, cache-busting, and error fallback.
frontend/src/components/BannerManager.ts: Admin banner management component allowing upload from device or external URL with real-time validation, preview, progress tracking, and CRUD operations for banners.
frontend/src/components/FacebookPresence: Renders a Facebook Page Plugin iframe embed for the school's Facebook page with loading states, error fallback to a clickable Facebook icon link, and configurable height.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Displays the site footer with school logo, contact information, social media links, and an animated marquee copyright notice with credits.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Implements the main navigation header with data-driven menu structure, mobile sheet menu, authentication controls (login/logout), and admin dashboard access for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the main application layout structure with Banner, Header, main content outlet, and Footer components.
frontend/src/components/PageHeader.tsx: Renders a customizable page header with title, optional description, background styling with error handling, and optional blinking title animation.
frontend/src/components/PhilippineTimeCl: Displays a live clock showing Philippine Standard Time (GMT+8) formatted as a sentence with day, date, and time, updating every second.
frontend/src/components/SchoolActivities: Fetches and displays school activity images in an auto-playing carousel with infinite loop, sorted by display order, and includes loading/error states plus empty state with admin link.
frontend/src/components/WeatherForecastS: Displays current weather and 3-day forecast for Barobo, Caraga using the useBaroboWeather hook, with weather icons mapped to condition codes and loading/error states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, initializing access control with admin token and invalidating dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBaroboWeather.ts: React Query hook that fetches current weather and 3-day forecast for Barobo, Caraga from Open-Meteo API, with WMO weather code interpretation and 30-minute caching.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for backend data fetching and mutations including user profiles, admin permissions, content management (banners, alumni, heritage), analytics, and file operations with proper cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for school theme (maroon/gold), Citizen Charter colors, dark mode support, and styling overrides for Quill editor and navigation dropdowns.
frontend/src/lib/externalBlobUpload.ts: Utility for uploading files via ExternalBlob with progress tracking, resilient URL validation using HEAD/GET requests with exponential backoff retries (up to 8 attempts) to handle eventual consistency.
frontend/src/lib/facebookPagePlugin.ts: Helper function to build Facebook Page Plugin iframe URLs with configurable options for tabs, dimensions, header style, and social features.
frontend/src/lib/imageProxy.ts: Provides utilities to proxy cloud storage URLs (Google Drive, OneDrive, Dropbox, Google Photos) through the backend to bypass CORS restrictions, including validation functions for images and videos with detailed error messages.
frontend/src/lib/uploadErrorMessage.ts: Parses and categorizes upload errors (permission, network, validation, backend, size, generic) into user-friendly messages with detailed error classification and logging utilities.
frontend/src/lib/urlConverter.ts: Converts cloud storage sharing URLs (Google Drive, OneDrive, Dropbox, Google Photos) and YouTube links to direct media access or embeddable formats with client-side processing and fallback handling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/src/pages/ActionResearchPage.ts: Presents information about teacher-led action research initiatives, including research areas (instructional strategies, engagement, assessment) and the research process.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page that handles Super Admin initialization and recovery, displays user role/permissions, and provides navigation to various admin management sections with authentication checks.
frontend/src/pages/AdvisoriesCircularsPa: Displays a placeholder page for school advisories and circulars with a message indicating content will be posted when available.
Admin page for managing alumni content (title, description, community engagement) and alumni profiles (name, graduation year, achievements, position) with create, update, and delete operations.
frontend/src/pages/AlumniPage.tsx: Public-facing alumni page displaying alumni content and distinguished alumni profiles with loading states and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyticsDashboardPag: Super Admin-only analytics dashboard showing visitor and login statistics with bar/line charts for daily, weekly, monthly, and yearly metrics.
frontend/src/pages/ARALProgramPage.tsx: Displays information about the ARAL (Accelerated Reading for All Learners) program focused on improving reading comprehension and literacy skills.
frontend/src/pages/ArchivedIssuancesPage: Placeholder page for displaying historical records of past issuances and documents.
Admin page wrapper for the BannerManager component to upload and manage the school website banner.
frontend/src/pages/BKDPage.tsx: Static informational page about the Bawat Bata Bumabasa (BKD) literacy program.
frontend/src/pages/BNHSHymnManagementPag: Admin page for uploading and managing the BNHS hymn video via file upload or URL (YouTube/external links) with validation and preview.
frontend/src/pages/BrigadaEskwelaPage.ts: Static informational page about the Brigada Eskwela school maintenance and improvement program.
frontend/src/pages/BYESOPage.tsx: Static informational page about the Barangay Youth and Education Support Office (BYESO).
frontend/src/pages/ChildProtectionPolicy: Static informational page describing the school's child protection policy and procedures.
frontend/src/pages/CitizenCharterManagem: Admin page for managing Citizen's Charter content including background images, static images, and editable sections for contact info, office hours, and school hours with file/URL upload support.
frontend/src/pages/CitizenCharterPage.ts: Public-facing Citizen's Charter page displaying school contact information, office hours, school hours, and an embedded Google Maps location with customizable background and static images.
frontend/src/pages/ClassroomObservationP: Simple page describing classroom observation practices for monitoring teaching effectiveness and supporting professional growth.
frontend/src/pages/ClubsOrganizationsPag: Displays student clubs (Science, Math, English, Arts, Sports, Music) and special organizations (PAT, JDRRA, BYESO) with descriptions and icons.
frontend/src/pages/DepEdMemorandaPage.ts: Placeholder page for displaying official Department of Education memoranda with a message indicating content will be posted when available.
frontend/src/pages/DepEdOrdersPage.tsx: Placeholder page for displaying official Department of Education orders with a message indicating content will be posted when available.
frontend/src/pages/DivisionMonitoringPag: Simple page describing division-level monitoring and evaluation coordination with the division office.
frontend/src/pages/DivisionOrdersMemoran: Placeholder page for displaying Division Office orders and memoranda with a message indicating content will be posted when available.
frontend/src/pages/DownloadableFormsPage: Lists downloadable school forms (enrollment, Brigada Eskwela, 4P's, SF2, SF3, etc.) with download buttons and includes an early registration portal link.
frontend/src/pages/ESWMPage.tsx: Describes the Ecological Solid Waste Management program promoting waste segregation, recycling, composting, and environmental sustainability education.
frontend/src/pages/FARPage.tsx: Simple page describing Field Assistance Reports for documenting field visits and support provided to teachers and departments.
frontend/src/pages/FinancialBoardPage.ts: Simple page describing financial transparency and accountability through reporting of school finances, budget allocation, and expenditures.
frontend/src/pages/GPPPage.tsx: Describes the Gulayan sa Paaralan Program (school gardening initiative) promoting food security, nutrition awareness, and environmental stewardship through hands-on activities.
frontend/src/pages/HistoryManagementPage: Admin page for managing school history content with a rich text editor (ReactQuill), title input, and background image upload supporting both file uploads and external URLs (Google Drive, OneDrive, Dropbox) with validation and preview.
frontend/src/pages/HistoryPage.tsx: Public-facing page displaying school history content with a background image overlay, title, and formatted text rendered from ReactQuill HTML content.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page featuring Philippine time clock, weather forecast, Facebook presence, school activities slider, BNHS hymn video (YouTube or direct), DepEd vision/mission, visitor counter, and Citizen's Charter with background images.
frontend/src/pages/InfrastructurePage.ts: Static page describing school infrastructure and facilities development.
frontend/src/pages/InkspirerPage.tsx: Empty page component with no content.
frontend/src/pages/INSETPage.tsx: Static page describing In-Service Training (INSET) for teachers' professional development.
frontend/src/pages/InstructionalSupervis: Static page describing instructional supervision for monitoring and improving teaching quality.
frontend/src/pages/JDRRAPage.tsx: Static page describing the Junior Disaster Risk Reduction and Management program including earthquake drills, fire safety, and emergency procedures.
frontend/src/pages/KhanAcademyPage.tsx: Static page with a link to Khan Academy's free online learning resources.
frontend/src/pages/LearningCurriculumPag: Page displaying school curriculum programs (SPA, SPTVE, STEM, Senior High School tracks) using an accordion component for expandable content sections.
frontend/src/pages/LearningMaterialsPage: Page listing external educational resource links (SDS Division Portal, DepEd LRMDS, DepEd Website, DepEd TV) in a card grid layout.
frontend/src/pages/LessonPlanPage.tsx: Displays a static page with guidelines and templates for preparing lesson plans and daily lesson logs (DLL).
frontend/src/pages/MDLFeedbackPage.tsx: Static page showing feedback mechanisms and means of verification for Modular Distance Learning implementation.
frontend/src/pages/NATResourcesPage.tsx: Static page providing National Achievement Test preparation materials including practice tests and study guides.
frontend/src/pages/NCAEResourcesPage.tsx: Static page with National Career Assessment Examination resources to help students identify career interests and aptitudes.
Static page displaying classroom observation tools and instruments for monitoring instruction and providing teacher feedback.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizationalStructu: Admin page for managing organizational structure images (title background and static image) with upload from device/URL, validation, preview, and removal capabilities.
Public page displaying the organizational structure with a custom title background and a static organizational chart image.
frontend/src/pages/PATPage.tsx: Static page describing the Parents and Teachers Association, its role, activities, and community involvement.
frontend/src/pages/PhysicalEvaluationPag: Static page about regular evaluation of school facilities and infrastructure for safe learning environments.
frontend/src/pages/PMCFPage.tsx: Static page about the Performance Management and Competency Framework for teacher evaluation and professional development.
frontend/src/pages/PRAISEPage.tsx: Static page describing the Program on Awards and Incentives for Services Excellence that recognizes outstanding faculty and staff performance.
frontend/src/pages/PrefectOfDisciplinePa: Static page describing the Prefect of Discipline office's role in maintaining order and promoting positive behavior through restorative practices.
frontend/src/pages/ResearchInnovationsPa: Placeholder page for upcoming research activities and innovative programs content.
frontend/src/pages/ResearchOutputsPage.t: Static page showcasing research publications, outputs, and their impact on the educational community.
frontend/src/pages/SBMPage.tsx: Static page about School-Based Management, emphasizing community participation in decision-making and governance.
frontend/src/pages/SchoolActivitiesManag: Admin page for managing slider images with upload from device or URL, validation, preview, edit/delete functionality, and authentication checks. Uses custom hooks for backend queries and image proxy validation.
frontend/src/pages/SchoolBasedResearchPa: Displays information about school-based research initiatives, including research focus areas and collaborative approaches using cards and lists.
frontend/src/pages/SchoolHealthPage.tsx: Static page presenting the school's health and nutrition programs with a header and card describing health screenings, feeding programs, and health education.
frontend/src/pages/SchoolOrdersMemoranda: Displays a placeholder page for school orders and memoranda with a message indicating content will be posted when available.
frontend/src/pages/SIPPage.tsx: Static page outlining the School Improvement Plan with strategic initiatives for enhancing educational quality.
frontend/src/pages/SMEAPage.tsx: Static page for transparent reporting of School Maintenance and Other Operating Expenses allocation and utilization.
frontend/src/pages/SOSAPage.tsx: Static page describing School Operations and School Administration management and operational aspects.
frontend/src/pages/SPTAPage.tsx: Displays a static page for the School Parent-Teacher Association with a header and a card containing placeholder information about SPTA activities and financial transparency.
frontend/src/pages/StorageMonitorPage.ts: Super Admin-only page displaying storage statistics, usage percentage, file type breakdown with pie chart, and capacity warnings using Recharts visualization.
frontend/src/pages/StudentCornerPage.tsx: Displays student resources including Students' Outputs and Freedom Wall sections in a maroon-themed layout with cards.
frontend/src/pages/SummativeAssessmentPa: Static page describing summative assessment monitoring for tracking student learning outcomes evaluation.
frontend/src/pages/SupportServicesPage.t: Displays comprehensive support services (guidance, library, health, career, etc.) in a grid layout with icons, descriptions, and contact information.
frontend/src/pages/TheInkspirerPage.tsx: Displays a list of announcements fetched from the backend, showing title, publish date, content, and an 'Important' badge for flagged items. Uses PageHeader with a background image and Card components for layout.
frontend/src/pages/TintangBaloboPage.tsx: Placeholder page for the school publication 'Tintang Balobo' with a PageHeader and a Card displaying a 'coming soon' message.
frontend/src/pages/TOsPage.tsx: Static page for Teaching Observations with basic information about structured teaching observations and developmental feedback.
frontend/src/pages/TQPage.tsx: Static page describing Teacher Quality standards and benchmarks for professional competence.
frontend/src/pages/UserManagementPage.ts: Super Admin-only page for managing admin users with CRUD operations, permission assignment, and status toggling. Includes dialogs for creating/editing users and a table displaying all admin users with their roles and permissions.
frontend/src/pages/WINSPage.tsx: Static informational page describing the WINS (War on Illiteracy through Numeracy and Literacy Skills) program with a PageHeader and Card layout.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes (school colors, chart colors, sidebar colors), container settings, border radius variables, and keyframe animations using OKLCH color space.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking known issues (YouTube embedding in BNHS Hymn), existing features for fixing video embedding functionality, and a pending feature request to resolve the external link video display problem.
